descriptionEn: Name means "faithful" or "trustworthy." He is the eldest son of David by Ahinoam. When Amnon rapes his sister Tamar, Absalom, her brother, seeks revenge and has Amnon murdered.

verses.line: And unto David were sons born in Hebron: and his firstborn was Amnon, of Ahinoam the Jezreelitess;
And the servants of Absalom did unto Amnon as Absalom had commanded. Then all the king's sons arose, and every man gat him up upon his mule, and fled.

images.caption: Oil on oak panel drawing of Amnon and Tamar in 1661-1670 by Jan Steen
